professional_summary: Engineering Manager with strong hands-on backend expertise in Java (Spring Boot) and Python, combined with extensive experience in designing scalable, distributed systems using microservices architecture. Highly proficient in cloud-native development across multi-cloud environments including GCP, AWS, AliCloud, and Rakuten One Cloud (ROC). Experienced in containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and building robust CI/CD pipelines using Bitbucket Pipelines and Jenkins. Actively involved in AI/LLM initiatives, including development and deployment of self-hosted large language models and custom-trained AI systems, enabling intelligent automation and enhanced engineering productivity.

responsibilities: Hands-on backend development using Java (Spring Boot) and Python for scalable and high-performance services
Migrating and modernizing legacy applications into cloud-native architectures using Rakuten One Cloud (ROC) and other cloud platforms
Redefining system architecture to align with microservices and cloud-native best practices
Designing and implementing containerized solutions using Docker and orchestrating workloads with Kubernetes
Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using Bitbucket Pipelines and Jenkins for automated deployment and delivery
Implementing AI-driven solutions to enhance development workflows and productivity
Conducting performance testing, optimization, and fine-tuning of applications (CPU, memory, and I/O efficiency)
Manage and mentor teams of Backend Engineers, and Data Engineers, supporting their growth and performance
KPI Planning and Review, One on one session, Company strategic meeting
Initiate discovery/brainstorming/troubleshooting session, code reviews, and ensure adherence to programming standards
Architect and oversee cloud infrastructure and microservices design for scalability and reliability
Provide technical direction to a cross-functional development team
Performance fine tuning (memory, cpu, and storage usage, database utilization)
Review technical documentation and Product Requirement Documents (PRDs) to ensure clarity and alignment in technical aspects
Promote and implement DevOps practices such as CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and containerization (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) for efficient deployment
Act as a bridge between business and technology teams, ensuring effective communication of technical requirements and project progress
Led development and deployment of self-hosted LLM solutions and custom-trained AI models to support internal tools and business use cases
Implemented AI-driven systems leveraging fine-tuned models to improve operational efficiency and decision-making
Manager for Backend Division: Leading the backend division
Lead Discovery Sessions, Sharing Sessions, Code Reviews, and Programming Standardization: Conducting sessions and reviews to ensure high standards
Cloud and Microservices Architect: Designing and implementing cloud and microservices architectures
Team Leader for Backend Division: Leading the backend team
Lead Discovery Sessions: Identifying user requirements and establishing the overall direction of the application mechanism
Database Design: Designing the database structure and database relations
Team Leader for Design Guides: Developing internal and external design guides from concept to development
Lead Discovery Sessions: Identifying product requirements and establishing the overall direction of the application mechanism
Database and UX Design: Designing the database structure, business processes, user experience, and user interface

Developing a web based Human Resources Application (HRIS) using Eclipse for the IDE, Java, Hibernate and ZK Framework. Utilizing MSSQL for the Database. The calculation logic were also put inside the MSSQL Stored Procedure

Developing a mobile based Human Resources Application (Native) for Android using Android Studio for the IDE, Java, Volley. Utilizing MSSQL for the Database. The calculation logic were also put inside the MSSQL Stored Procedure
